{{Quote|Vape, cold one.|[[Garik Loran]]|<ref name="X-Wing: Solo Command">''[[X-Wing: Solo Command]]''</ref>}}
'''Vape''' was the personal [[R2-series astromech droid/Legends|R2 unit]] of [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]]/commando [[Garik Loran|Garik 'Face' Loran]]. Early into Loran's tenure in [[Wraith Squadron]] he persuaded [[Cubber Daine]], the squadron mechanic, to make some modifications to the [[Droid/Legends|droid]]. In addition to having his red paint job updated to the unit's gray [[Color/Legends|coloring]], the droid, with the command "cold one", dispensed bottles of chilled [[Ebla beer/Legends|Ebla beer]].

{{Droid-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
The beer dispensing feature is described on page 152 of [[X-Wing: Solo Command]].
